summary: CLT Synapse ERP Course Catalog Enhancements Testing Complete. All features verified: (1) Commission columns (SE, TL, SM) in Course Catalog table and edit modal, (2) Bulk actions (delete, activate, deactivate) working, (3) Historical import template has 4 sheets with correct structure including commission columns on Courses sheet.

minor.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 for creation - works correctly but non-standard HTTP status

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/course-catalog returns items with commission_sales_executive, commission_team_leader, commission_sales_manager fields
Backend: POST /api/course-catalog creates item with commission fields (returns 200)
Backend: PUT /api/course-catalog/{id} updates commission fields successfully
Backend: POST /api/course-catalog/bulk-action with action=deactivate deactivates items
Backend: POST /api/course-catalog/bulk-action with action=activate re-activates items
Backend: POST /api/course-catalog/bulk-action with action=delete deletes items
Backend: Bulk action validation - returns 400 for invalid action
Backend: Bulk action validation - returns 400 for empty ids
Backend: Bulk action requires admin/super_admin role (403 for sales_executive)
Backend: Historical template download returns xlsx file with 4 sheets

Backend: Historical template Sheet 1 (Historical Sales Data) has 14 columns: Full Name, Phone, Course Enrolled, Course Amount, Add-ons, Add-on Amount, Agent Name, Team Name, Enrolled Amount, Enrolled At, Email, Country, City, Source
Backend: Historical template Sheet 2 (Courses & Prices) has commission columns: Commission SE, Commission TL, Commission SM
Backend: Historical template Sheet 3 (Add-ons & Prices) has Add-on Name and Price columns
Backend: Historical template Sheet 4 (Teams & Agents) has Agent Name and Team Name columns
Frontend: Course Catalog page (/courses) loads correctly
Frontend: Table displays commission columns (SE Comm., TL Comm., SM Comm.)
Frontend: Filter buttons work (All, Course, Add-on, Upgrade) with counts
Frontend: Add Item modal opens with commission input fields (Sales Executive, Team Leader, Sales Manager)
Frontend: Edit modal shows existing commission values and allows updates
Frontend: Select all checkbox works and shows bulk actions bar
Frontend: Bulk actions bar shows Activate, Deactivate, Delete buttons
critical_code_review_comments: Commission fields properly stored in course_catalog collection with defaults of 0
Bulk action endpoint (line 2166-2185) properly handles delete/activate/deactivate with admin role restriction
Historical template (line 8900-8991) generates 4 sheets with openpyxl including commission columns on Courses sheet
Frontend CoursesPage.jsx properly displays commission columns and handles CRUD with commission fields

success_rate.backend: 100% (14/14 tests passed - 2 creation tests return 200 instead of 201 but data is correct)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - 22 existing items in course catalog
context_for_next_testing_agent: Course Catalog with commission fields and bulk actions fully tested. Key features: (1) Each course/addon/upgrade has commission_sales_executive, commission_team_leader, commission_sales_manager fields (default 0), (2) Bulk actions work for delete/activate/deactivate with confirmation, (3) Historical template has 4 sheets with new column structure. Total 22 items in catalog: 10 courses, 6 add-ons, 6 upgrades.
